heading: Cross reference
label: 4227 Cross reference
text: For exception for a sale to an Indian tribal government (or its subdivision) for the exclusive use of an Indian tribal government (or its subdivision), see section 7871.
notes: Amendments1986— amended section generally, substituting “reference” for “references” in section catchline, struck out par. (1) designation, substituted “exception” for “exemption”, and struck out par. (2) relating to cross reference to credit for taxes on tires.Pub. L. 99–5141984—Par. (2). struck out “and tubes” after “on tires”.Pub. L. 98–3691983— designated existing provisions as par. (2) and added par. (1).Pub. L. 97–4731976— struck out pars. (1) and (3) relating to cross references to exemption from tax in case of certain sales to the United States and to administrative provisions of general applicability, respectively.Pub. L. 94–4551965—Par. (2). struck out “and automobile radio and television receiving sets,” after “tires and inner tubes,”.Pub. L. 89–44

Effective Date of 1976 AmendmentAmendment by effective on first day of first month which begins more than 90 days after , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 94–455section 1904(d) of Pub. L. 94–455section 4041 of this titleOct. 4, 1976
